title: Selling Presets Without Stripe: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, or any other country with restricted access to PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip, you're not alone in your struggle to sell presets and other digital products. You've probably heard the usual advice to use a different payment processor or find a different marketplace, but those solutions often come with significant drawbacks. In this post, we'll cut through the noise and give you the straight truth about what you can expect from each option, and what you can do to get paid without the hassle.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are all popular payment processors that have been around for years, but they're not without their limitations. Each has its own set of features and fees, but they all require you to have a bank account or other payment method that's linked to your country's banking system. This means that if you're in a country where PayPal or Stripe is restricted, you're out of luck. Gumroad and Payhip are a bit more flexible, but they still require you to have a PayPal or Stripe account to receive payments. Meanwhile, Web3 Wallet Connect provides a native cryptocurrency payment solution that bypasses traditional banking restrictions and allows buyers to pay directly with their crypto wallet.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

The biggest problem with traditional payment processors is that they often have a list of 'restricted countries' where they don't allow transactions. This can include countries like Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, and Bangladesh, where PayPal and Stripe have been known to block accounts without warning. Gumroad and Payhip are a bit more lenient, but they still require you to jump through hoops to get approved. In contrast, Web3 Wallet Connect doesn't care about your country of origin – all it cares about is whether you have a crypto wallet that can make a payment. This means that you can sell presets and other digital products to buyers all over the world, without worrying about getting blocked or restricted.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed and fees, traditional payment processors are often a mixed bag. PayPal and Stripe can be fast and convenient, but they often charge high fees – up to 3.5% + $0.30 per transaction. Gumroad and Payhip are a bit more affordable, but they still take a cut of your sales. Meanwhile, Web3 Wallet Connect charges a flat fee of 0.5% per transaction, and payments are typically processed in under 10 minutes. This means that you can get paid faster and keep more of your money, without breaking the bank.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

When it comes to automation and delivery, traditional payment processors often require you to do a lot of legwork. You'll need to set up a separate account, configure payment settings, and deal with customer support. Meanwhile, Web3 Wallet Connect automates the entire process for you – simply connect your crypto wallet, and you're good to go. You'll also get access to our admin dashboard, where you can track orders, manage inventory, and see real-time analytics. This means that you can focus on creating content and selling presets, without worrying about the technical details.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is right for you? If you're looking for a traditional payment processor that's widely accepted, PayPal or Stripe might be a good choice. But if you're in a restricted country, or you want to avoid high fees and complex setup, Web3 Wallet Connect is the way to go. Our native cryptocurrency payment solution is fast, affordable, and flexible – and it's the perfect choice for creators who want to sell presets and other digital products without the hassle.
